A Grounded Ecosystem

HackMSIT provides a scholarly environment where 1000+ builders converge for 48 hours to craft elegant, meaningful software that withstands the test of time.

From Legacy to Innovation

Rooted in the strategic brilliance and undefeated spirit of Maharaja Surajmal, MSIT carries forward a history of building enduring foundations.

Today, that legacy transforms from stone fortresses to digital architectures. HackMSIT bridges the monumental achievements of the past with the technological breakthroughs of tomorrow.







Domains of Study

Trust & Systems

Develop secure architectures, blockchain integrations, and resilient systems.

Intelligence & Data

Train models, interpret data, and automate meaningful capabilities.

Society & Accessibility

Build tools that bridge gaps, improve public infrastructure, and serve communities.

The Academic Expedition

A 48-Hour Legacy Timeline

Day 1 (10th April)09:00 AM

Gates Open & Registration

Day 1 (10th April)10:00 AM

The Inaugural Address

Day 1 (10th April)11:00 AM

Hacking Commences

Day 1 (10th April)01:00 PM

Royal Feast (Lunch)

Day 1 (10th April)05:00 PM

Mentorship & Counsel Round 1

Day 2 (11th April)08:00 AM

Dawn Hack Resumes

Day 2 (11th April)10:00 AM

Mentorship Round 2

Day 2 (11th April)01:00 PM

Final Commits & Judging

Day 2 (11th April)05:00 PM
